## Title

- Use a Conventional Commit style PR title: `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `refactor: ...`, `docs: ...`, `chore: ...`.
- For `dev` -> `main` promotion PRs, default to `chore: promote dev to main`.
- Use `release: ...` only for versioned release PRs.
